kicad_stable_repo.description: Official Python bindings repository for KiCad 10 IPC API.

magpylib_repo.description: Source code for the magpylib library. Use this to inspect structural classes, sensor models, and orientation math signatures.

motor_papers.description: Technical literature, equations, and design constraints for BOTH axial flux (rotary) and linear (translational) PCB motors, covering pole pitch, track width, and multi-layer winding topologies.

tauri-docs.description: Official Tauri framework architecture, IPC commands, state management, and configuration specs. Reference this to verify API structures and command syntax.
